notable_prs.title: Refactor auth middleware to async pipeline
notable_prs.description: Complete rewrite of auth middleware from synchronous chain to async pipeline. Reduced p95 latency from 820ms to 340ms. Zero behavior change — all 47 existing tests pass without modification.

notable_prs.title: Implement rate limiter with sliding window
notable_prs.description: New rate limiting system using Redis sliding window. Replaced the leaky bucket implementation that was causing false positives under burst traffic.

notable_prs.title: Quick fix: patch user lookup for null emails
notable_prs.description: Hotfix for prod issue — users with null emails were crashing the lookup service.
quality_signals: minimal fix but no guard at API boundary

review_quality_samples.comment: This cache invalidation logic will break if two requests hit the same key within the TTL window. Consider using a lock or check-and-set pattern. See: https://redis.io/docs/manual/transactions/#cas
review_quality_samples.quality: high — caught a concurrency bug with a specific fix

review_quality_samples.comment: Nice work on the error handling! One suggestion: extract the validation into a separate function so you can reuse it in the batch endpoint we're building next sprint. Here's a pattern that works well: [code example]
review_quality_samples.quality: high — mentoring with actionable code example

goals_detail.goal: Write architecture doc for event system
Lead Q2 planning for auth team
Reduce tech debt in payments module

anthropic_usage.quality_note: Uses Claude for high-leverage tasks — architecture and debugging, not just autocomplete.
